text.title: django-services Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for django-services as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Importing DRF's Response, serializers.ValidationError, or any Django HttpResponse into service modules.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Services become untestable without a full DRF request context and unreusable from non-HTTP entry points like Celery.
